testcase.name: SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-A · jwt_local_valid_no_resolve_call → /home AND 0 backend call
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-B · no_jwt_resolve_returns_landing → /welcome (真后端打通)
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-C · jwt_expired_resolve_returns_login → /auth/login?redirect=...
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-D · resolve_500_offline_with_stale_jwt → /home (stale tolerance)
